TextRun.Value: *This data is not required but voluntary
Please note that all rates are subject to additional fees, service charges and taxes.
A safe is available for the protection of your valuables.
A QAR 760,- room recovery fee will apply for smoking in a non-smoking room.
I would like to handle my account (check one):

"I agree that I am personally liable for the payment of account and if the person, company or association indicated by me as being responsible for payment of the same does not do so that my liability for such payment shall be joint and several with such person, company or association."

PRIVACY INFORMATION The Marriott Group*** will collect and use Personal Data as described in our Global Privacy Statement available under ww.marriott.com/about/privacy.mi (and at the front desk) to provide you with goods and services, to comply with legal and contractual requirements and, if necessary, to assert or defend a legal right or claim.

The Marriott Group will also collect your preferences, that is your needs and wishes that we use to make your current and future stays and experience with us more enjoyable, such as preferred rooms, amenities, food and beverages, and other services requested by you or which we learn about during your stay. This may also include any likes and dislikes about our services that you tell us about or specific dietary or health restrictions, for example, when using our dining services.

We may also collect your Personal Preferences with your consent, including details of your special anniversaries (such as your birthday or wedding anniversary), what type of activities you prefer to take part in when staying with us, your hobbies, and details about who you usually travel with, their relationship to you and your marital status; see "More Information About Your Personal Preferences" in the Global Privacy Statement.

We will share Personal Data with Owners and Franchisees and they are required to use Personal Data in accordance with their contract with us, the Global Privacy Statement, and applicable laws. The Marriott Group, Owners, and Franchisees are each independently responsible for Personal Data. For more information, see "How And When We Share Your Data" in the Global Privacy Statement.

Personal Data will be transferred to the U.S. and other countries where data protection laws may differ from those of your home country. For more details, including on the applicable safeguards, see "Cross-Border Transfer" in the Global Privacy Statement. You may request (as available) access to, correction, restriction, portability, or deletion of your Personal Data, object to the processing, or exercise any of your rights under applicable laws by accessing "Privacy Rights" in the Marriott Privacy Center, available at www.marriott.com/about/privacy.mi or by writing to: Privacy, Marriott International, Thompson House, MacCurtain Street, Cork City, T23 W2DW, Ireland. You may also make a complaint with a data protection authority at any time, or contact our Data Protection Officer at
Having read the Privacy Information above, I agree to the following:

To provide me with a personalized experience, the Marriott Group may save and use my Personal Preferences, as detailed above and in "More Information About Your Personal Preferences" in the Global Privacy Statement. I understand that I can withdraw this consent at any time by asking the Marriott Group to stop retaining my Personal Preferences via the contact details above or as indicated in the Global Privacy Statement

The consent above applies only to the processing of Personal Preferences. If you would like to receive special offers, promotions, or other marketing communications, or if you would like to change what you currently receive, you can update your communication preferences in the Marriott Bonvoy app, by sending an email to Privacy@marriott.com or MarriottDPO@marriott.com, or by writing to us at the above contact information.

***Capitalized terms used in this Registration Card are described in the Global Privacy Statement. This property is owned by Nozul Hotels & Resorts and managed by W Doha Hotel & Residences, each independent data controllers.
West Bay, Zone 61,P.O. box 19573, Street 831, Building 262, Doha, Qatar
